snippet.title: Jenny Wilkins
snippet.description:
Retired head librarian in Glastonbury, CT. I watch gardening tutorials, hosta talks, and native plant videos. Shade gardener, perennial enthusiast, and lifelong learner.

Subscribed to: American Hosta Society, CT Native Plant Society, Fine Gardening, Gardeners World, National Trust Gardens.

channel.title: Jenny Wilkins
channel.description: Shade gardener and retired librarian in Glastonbury CT. Watching gardening videos to learn more about hostas, native ferns, and Connecticut native plants.
channel.keywords: hostas shade garden native plants Connecticut ferns perennials Glastonbury gardening
